deferredReason: Tracked-work creation only; fix deferred pending maintainer supply-chain decision (design.md Open Question Q1). linkedTests and evidenceRefs will be populated by the delivery pass.

scenarios.title: Built smackerel-ml image contains the gkeepapi live-mode dependency

gherkin.given: the smackerel-ml image is built from ml/Dockerfile
gherkin.when: ml/requirements.txt is installed during the build
gherkin.then: python -c "import gkeepapi" exits 0 inside the image

scenarios.title: Structural guard test catches removal of the gkeepapi pin (adversarial regression)

gherkin.given: a guard test asserts an exact gkeepapi== pin on the build surface
gherkin.when: the gkeepapi pin is removed from ml/requirements.txt
gherkin.then: the guard test fails RED, catching the exact reintroduction of this bug

scenarios.title: Live-mode authentication no longer raises gkeepapi-not-installed

gherkin.when: keep_bridge.authenticate() runs in a built image
gherkin.then: RuntimeError("gkeepapi is not installed") is not raised
